name: Asylum Sports Center
description:
More options to play PICKLEBALL!
Clinics/Lessons/Court Rentals
Family Pickleball Nights at
 Asylum Sports Center

*Fun fact about pickleball on grass turf*: "Pickleball is the fastest-growing sport in the USA! It’s a fast-paced and fun sport that is played on a court with a hard surface. However, playing on a hard court can be tough on the body, especially for those who are older or have joint problems. That’s where artificial grass comes in. Using artificial grass on or around a pickleball court can provide a softer, more forgiving surface that can help players avoid injuries."- pickleball pro

Call or stop by today to book!
